descriptions: Aquino-Coluccio-Scali and Mazzaferro-Femia were opposing sides in the Faida di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica, fra gli Aquino-Coluccio-Scali e i Mazzaferro-Femia negli anni '70.

descriptions: Al-Bara Battalion is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Al-Bara Battalion

Società di Polistena.description: The Società di Polistena is a 'ndrangheta criminal organization based in Polistena, Calabria, Italy, with influence in surrounding towns. It has been active since the late 19th century, with early recorded bosses including Pasquale Ferrara and Francesco Sergio. The group engaged in drug and arms trafficking, and was involved in reconstruction after the 1905 earthquake. It remains active, with historical ties to the Guerrisi and Mercuri families.

descriptions: Società di Polistena is a criminal organization of 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La società di Polistena (o Locale di Polistena) è un'organizzazione criminale di 'ndrangheta

descriptions: Società di Polistena is dependent on the Mandamento tirrenico.
edges.evidence_quote: dipendente dal Mandamento tirrenico

descriptions: FARC-EP Second Marquetalia is a faction of FARC dissidents.
edges.evidence_quote: Currently, FARC-EP consists of more than 10 factions such as FARC-EP Second Marquetalia

descriptions: Hells Angels forced the Apollos biker gang to disband in 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2000, the Hells Angels forced the disbanding of the Apollos biker gang in Regina.

Colima Cartel.description: Mexican drug trafficking and methamphetamine producing cartel founded in 1988 by José de Jesús Amezcua Contreras and his brothers. Based in Guadalajara, Jalisco, it controlled the methamphetamine trade using precursor chemicals from Asia. The cartel was absorbed into the Sinaloa Cartel and became defunct by 2005.

descriptions: Colima Cartel listed as allied with Guadalajara Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Guadalajara Cartel Milenio Cartel Sonora Cartel

descriptions: Colima Cartel listed as allied with Milenio Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Guadalajara Cartel Milenio Cartel Sonora Cartel

descriptions: Colima Cartel became a branch of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The Colima cartel has become a branch of the Sinaloa Cartel as are the Milenio Cartel, Guadalajara Cartel, and Sonora Cartels.

descriptions: Colima Cartel became a branch of the Sinaloa Cartel by 2007.
edges.evidence_quote: By 2007, the Sonora Cartel, Colima Cartel , and Milenio Cartel became branches of the Sinaloa Cartel .

descriptions: Colima Cartel listed as allied with Sonora Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Guadalajara Cartel Milenio Cartel Sonora Cartel

descriptions: Colima Cartel is an ally of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Colima Cartel

descriptions: Colima Cartel became a branch of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The Milenio (Michoacán) , Jalisco (Guadalajara), Sonora (Sonora) , and Colima cartels were now branches of the Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Carelli is allied with the Zingari di Lauropoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con gli zingari di Lauropoli e con i Critelli di Cariati.

descriptions: Forastefano was involved in a feud against the Zingari di Lauropoli.
edges.evidence_quote: È stata coinvolta alla fine degli anni novanta e all'inizio del nuovo secolo nella faida contro gli Zingari di Lauropoli

Alkhalil family.description: A Palestinian Canadian family of gangsters based in Surrey, British Columbia. The family immigrated to Canada as refugees from Saudi Arabia in 1990. They have been involved in a long-standing feud with the Duhre brothers, resulting in multiple murders. Several family members have been killed or convicted of crimes.

descriptions: Alkhalil family members were tried for murdering members of the Dhak-Duhre gang, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Starting on 29 June 2021, Amero and Alkhalil were on trial in Vancouver for the 2012 murders of the rival gangsters Sandip Duhre and Suhhveer Dhak

descriptions: The Alkhalil family's feud with the Duhre brothers extends to the Dhak-Duhre group.
edges.evidence_quote: Naud was working as a drug dealer for the Dhak-Duhre group, and the killing of Khalil started a feud.

descriptions: The Alkhalil family and Duhre brothers have been in a violent feud since 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: A long-standing feud with the three Duhre brothers started at the beginning of the century.

descriptions: Mahmoud Alkhalil was killed in a shoot-out with the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: Mahmoud Alkhalil was a member of the Independent Soldiers street gang. On 16 August 2003, he was shot during a shoot-out with the Hells Angels on the dance floor of the Loft Six nightclub.

descriptions: Mahmoud Alkhalil was a member of the Independent Soldiers.
edges.evidence_quote: Mahmoud Alkhalil was a member of the Independent Soldiers street gang.

descriptions: Nabil Alkhalil acted as liaison between the Alkhalil family and the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Nabil Alkhalil is believed to have served as the Alkhalil family's liaison with the Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: The Alkhalil family, through Rabih Alkhalil, was part of the Wolfpack Alliance feuding with the UN.
edges.evidence_quote: The United Nations gang came to be involved in a violent feud with the Wolfpack Alliance led by Larry Amero and Rabih "Robby" Alkhalil of the Alkhalil family.

descriptions: The Alkhalil family joined the Wolfpack, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wolfpack soon took in other members, most notably the Alkhalil family

descriptions: Alkhalil family is listed as an ally of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Alkhalil family

descriptions: Rabih Alkhalil, a member of the Alkhalil family, was a leader of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Rabih 'Robby' Alkhalil relocated to Montreal... Alkhalil was the leader of the Wolfpack Alliance alongside Larry Amero.

'Ndrina Mandalari.description: The 'Ndrina Mandalari is a 'ndrina (family) of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Guardavalle, Calabria, Italy. It is active in construction, real estate, international drug trafficking, money laundering, waste management, and public contracts. The group has alliances with several other 'ndrine and is present in Milan and its hinterland, as well as in New York, Nevada, and Arizona. It also has ties to Freemasonry.

descriptions: Mandalari are allies of Gallico.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei ... Gallico

descriptions: Mandalari are allies of Molè.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei ... Molè

descriptions: Mandalari are suspected to have contacts with Morabito.
edges.evidence_quote: si suppone abbiano contatti anche con la 'Ndrina Morabito

descriptions: Mandalari are allies of Novella.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Novella

descriptions: Mandalari are allies of Palamara.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei ... Palamara

descriptions: Mandalari are allies of Papalia.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei ... Papalia

descriptions: Mandalari are allies of Romeo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei ... Romeo

descriptions: Mandalari are allies of Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei ... Macrì

descriptions: Riccardo Sibio of Clan dei Fasciani often served Banda della Magliana members.
edges.evidence_quote: Riccardo Sibio, appartenente al clan dei Fasciani e spesso al servizio anche dei componenti della Banda

descriptions: The Junior Black Mafia is mentioned as a successor or splinter group of the Black Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Junior Black Mafia

descriptions: Black Mafia members created the JBM as a successor organization.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1985, members of the original Black Mafia organized African-American youths into the Junior Black Mafia (JBM)

descriptions: JBM cooperated with Philadelphia crime family in cocaine distribution.
edges.evidence_quote: The JBM cooperates with associates of the Italian-American Bruno-Scarfo Mafia crime family in the distribution of cocaine

descriptions: JBM and Shower Posse were in a drug war.
edges.evidence_quote: The JBM was involved in a drug war with the Shower Posse in Southwest Philadelphia during the 1980s and early 1990s.

descriptions: K&A Gang and Junior Black Mafia were both involved in making Philadelphia the meth capital.
edges.evidence_quote: It is widely held that this was made possible due to the K&A Gang, and the Junior Black Mafia , among others.

descriptions: Infobox lists Junior Black Mafia as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bufalino crime family , DeCavalcante crime family , Detroit Partnership , Gambino crime family , Genovese crime family , Lucchese crime family , Patriarca crime family , Pittsburgh crime family , 10th & Oregon Crew , Junior Black Mafia , K&A Gang , Pagan's MC , Philadelphia Greek Mob , Warlocks MC

descriptions: Merlino aligned with the Junior Black Mafia during the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: During the 1990s, Merlino was also aligned with members of the Junior Black Mafia.

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Junior Black Mafia

descriptions: The infobox lists the Junior Black Mafia as an ally of the Philadelphia crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bufalino crime family, DeCavalcante crime family, Detroit Partnership, Gambino crime family, Genovese crime family, Lucchese crime family, Patriarca crime family, Pittsburgh crime family, 10th & Oregon Crew, Junior Black Mafia, K&A Gang, Pagan's MC, Philadelphia Greek Mob, Warlocks MC

descriptions: The infobox lists the Junior Black Mafia as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Junior Black Mafia

descriptions: The Shower Posse was in a drug war with the Junior Black Mafia, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Shower Posse was involved in a drug war with the Junior Black Mafia in Southwest Philadelphia during the 1980s and early 1990s.

descriptions: Eleventh Hour RC listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Road Runners MC , Bandidos , Mongols MC , Annihilators MC , Dirty Dozen MC , Vigilantes MC Eleventh Hour RC

descriptions: The infobox lists Eleventh Hour RC as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Eleventh Hour RC

descriptions: Eleventh Hour RC is listed as an ally of Loners MC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Road Runners MC , Bandidos , Mongols MC , Annihilators MC , Dirty Dozen MC , Vigilantes MC Eleventh Hour RC

descriptions: Colombian Army listed as ally of Bloque Metro in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Ejército Nacional de Colombia

descriptions: Bloque Metro allied with Colombian Army.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Ejército Nacional de Colombia

descriptions: Gallico, Morgante, Sgrò, and Sciglitano are named together as a coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: Le 'ndrine coinvolte sono quelle dei Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e Bruzzise -Parrello .

descriptions: Morgante and Sgrò are part of the same coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: Le 'ndrine coinvolte sono quelle dei Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e Bruzzise -Parrello .

descriptions: Sgrò and Sciglitano are part of the same coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: Le 'ndrine coinvolte sono quelle dei Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e Bruzzise -Parrello .

Slaughter House Gang.description: A prominent street gang in New York's Fourth Ward active from the late 1880s to the mid-1990s. Known for violent muggings and murder, they lured victims into bars or used a woman to dump ash to blind them before robbing them. The gang was led by George Leese, a river pirate and mugger, and remained dominant until after the American Civil War when police drove them out.

descriptions: Michaels family was affiliated with and under control of the Italian-American St. Louis crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Syrian-Lebanese crime families in St. Louis were affiliated with and under the control of the Italian-American St. Louis crime family headed by Anthony Giordano.

descriptions: Michaels and Leisure families engaged in open warfare after Giordano's death.
edges.evidence_quote: After Giordano's death from cancer on August 29, 1980, the Michaels and Leisure families entered into open warfare with one another.

Red Army.description: A hooligan firm associated with English football club Manchester United, active since the 1970s. Known for violence and criminal activities including drug smuggling, armed robberies, and theft. The firm has subdivisions such as the Inter City Jibbers (ICJ) which engages in acquisitive crime. Its activities have declined since the late 1980s.

descriptions: The Cutters clashed with the Red Army in 2005, known as 'The Battle of Everton Valley'.
edges.evidence_quote: The Cutters have been involved in a number of high-profile clashes with other firms, most notably in 2005 with the Red Army , a firm associated with Manchester United.

descriptions: The Quality Street Gang had links to the Inter City Jibbers and carried out armed robberies together in Holland.
edges.evidence_quote: Colin Blaney claims that members of the Quality Street Gang had links to a criminal element within the gang associated with the club known as the Inter City Jibbers, and carried out armed robberies together in Holland.

descriptions: The Red Army fought with the Inter City Firm.
edges.evidence_quote: It shows the Red Army fighting with the Inter City Firm (ICF) around Manchester.

descriptions: Kudo-kai annexed Kusano-ikka after prior conflicts.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1987, the Kudo-kai annexed the Kusano-ikka, a Kitakyushu-based yakuza clan which had frequent violent conflicts with the Kudo-kai until then.

descriptions: Perez-Iodice formed from the ranks of Buonerba.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo l'arresto di Buonerba si afferma un nuovo clan mazzarelliano in contrasto con la Paranza dei Bambini, i "Perez-Iodice", nato appunto dalle file dei Buonerba.

descriptions: Del Prete-Buonerba is a subgroup of Clan Mazzarella.
edges.evidence_quote: Appartenente al clan Del Prete-Buonerba (sottogruppo del clan Mazzarella).

descriptions: Both Os Manos and Brasas originated inside the same prison, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Dentro do presídio, originaram-se também os Brasas, outra facção criminosa.

Crazy Butch Gang.description: American juvenile street gang active in New York City's Lower East Side during the late 19th century. Known for pickpocketing and sneak thievery, they operated a 'snatch racket' involving staged bicycle accidents. Allied with the Eastman Gang, they dissolved after leader 'Crazy Butch' was killed in a gunfight.

descriptions: The Crazy Butch Gang was allied to the Eastman Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang was allied to the Eastman Gang who were at almost constant war with the Five Points and Humpty Jackson Gangs between the late 1890s and early 1900s as they were incorporated into the Squab Wheelmen , an ally of Monk Eastman's organization.

descriptions: The Crazy Butch Gang was incorporated into the Squab Wheelmen.
edges.evidence_quote: as they were incorporated into the Squab Wheelmen , an ally of Monk Eastman's organization.

descriptions: Lewisham Ghetto Boys is a regional subset of Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Lewisham Ghetto Boys

descriptions: The Young Lords were nationally affiliated with the Rainbow Coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: National affiliation: Rainbow Coalition

descriptions: Ruga, Leuzzi, and Vallelonga formed a mafia consortium.
edges.evidence_quote: Il processo faida dei boschi sancisce la presenza di una consorteria mafiosa dei Ruga-Leuzzi-Vallelonga

descriptions: Raiders MC is an affiliated support club under the Mongols.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mongols oversee the Raiders MC, an affiliated official support club.

Iron Horsemen Motorcycle Club.description: American outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1965 in Cincinnati, Ohio. Involved in drug trafficking, assault, and other crimes. Considered a second-tier outlaw motorcycle gang by law enforcement. Active in multiple states including Maryland, Kentucky, Maine, and Ohio.

descriptions: Bandidos and Iron Horsemen engaged in a shootout over a drug dispute.
edges.evidence_quote: Bandidos and members of the Iron Horsemen exchanged gunfire due to a drug dispute at a motorcycle rally near Zillah on June 18, 2000.

descriptions: Iron Horsemen are listed as an allied smaller motorcycle gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels are allied with numerous smaller motorcycle gangs – such as the ... Iron Horsemen

descriptions: Iron Horsemen MC listed as rival of Outlaws in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Devils Diciples MC, Diablos MC, El Forastero MC, Galloping Goose MC, Hells Angels MC, Highwaymen MC, Iron Horsemen MC, Loners MC, Mongols MC, Pagans MC, Red Devils MC, Sons of Silence MC, Warlocks MC

descriptions: The Iron Horsemen are rival biker gangs of the Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: Rival biker gangs of the Outlaws include the Devils Diciples, the Diablos, El Forastero, the Galloping Goose, the Hells Angels, the Highwaymen, the Iron Horsemen

descriptions: Outlaws had a violent rivalry with Iron Horsemen, including bombings and shootings.
edges.evidence_quote: A violent rivalry between the Outlaws and the Iron Horsemen in Greater Cincinnati began in the late 1960s.

descriptions: Outlaws and Iron Horsemen were involved in a gun battle together, but also had conflicts; later text shows assaults and shootouts between them.
edges.evidence_quote: The conflict between the Outlaws and the Hells Angels resulted in at least twelve homicides in Northeast Ohio in the years leading up to 1986.

descriptions: Outlaws MC is a rival of Iron Horsemen MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Devils Diciples MC , Diablos MC , El Forastero MC , Galloping Goose MC , Hells Angels MC , Highwaymen MC , Iron Horsemen MC , Loners MC , Mongols MC , Pagans MC , Red Devils MC , Sons of Silence MC , Warlocks MC

descriptions: Sons of Silence is allied with Iron Horsemen.
edges.evidence_quote: The club is allied with the Hells Angels and the Iron Horsemen

descriptions: Members of both clubs were traveling together, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: seven Sons of Silence and Iron Horsemen members were stopped by South Dakota Highway Patrol troopers as they travelled north on I-29

Tren del Llano.description: Venezuelan criminal organization founded by José Antonio Tovar Colina alias 'El Picure' in 2008, initially operating in Guárico and Aragua as a car theft gang. Known as one of the first megagangs, it engages in drug trafficking, extortion, homicide, and kidnapping. The group opposes Nicolás Maduro's rule after the 2024 election and has threatened opposition leader María Corina Machado.

descriptions: Listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Tren del Llano

descriptions: Infobox lists Tren del Llano as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Tren del Llano

descriptions: Tren del Llano is listed as an ally of Tren de Aragua in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Tren del Llano , Mafia Rusa , Cosa Nostra , Mara Salvatrucha , Unión Tepito

descriptions: Tren de Aragua lists Tren del Llano as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Tren del Llano

descriptions: Tren del Llano stole a cocaine shipment from Cártel de los Soles, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: El gobierno inició una operación contra Tren del Llano a finales de 2021, después de que el grupo presuntamente robara un cargamento de cocaína perteneciente al Cártel de los Soles.

descriptions: Tren del Llano displaced Los Caraqueños from Sucre, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Para mediados del 2020, el grupo expandió sus actividades al estado de Sucre, desplazando a una célula criminal llamada "Los Caraqueños" ligada al Tren de Aragua.

descriptions: Tren de Aragua is listed as an ally of Tren del Llano in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tren de Aragua

descriptions: Tren del Llano lists Tren de Aragua as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: El Tren de Aragua

Morello crime family.description: One of the earliest crime families in the United States, based in Italian Harlem, New York City. Founded by Giuseppe Morello in the 1890s, it engaged in racketeering, counterfeiting, and murder. The family defeated the Brooklyn Camorra and was a predecessor to the Genovese crime family. It was active until 1931.

descriptions: The Morello crime family founded the 116th Street Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Founders: Morello crime family

descriptions: Alfred Mineo's gang murdered Giuseppe Fanaro, a member of the Morello family.
edges.evidence_quote: In November 1913, Fanaro was murdered by members of the Lomonte and Alfred Mineo 's gangs.

descriptions: Camorra and Morello crime family were rivals in New York City.
edges.evidence_quote: They rivaled the now defunct Morello crime family for power in New York City.

descriptions: The Coney Island gang was in conflict with the Morello family.
edges.evidence_quote: Both gangs initially worked together against the Morello family from Italian Harlem for control of the lucrative New York rackets

descriptions: Infobox lists Morello as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Morello crime family

descriptions: D'Aquila was originally a crew of the Morello family before splitting off.
edges.evidence_quote: originally a crew of the Morello family prior to breaking off

descriptions: D'Aquila allied with the Morello family against the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1916 the Camorra had assassinated Nicholas Morello, head of the Morello gang. In response, D'Aquila allied with the Morellos to fight the Camorra.

descriptions: Allied Mafia family listed in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Morello crime family

descriptions: Giuseppe Fanaro was a member of the Morello family, which is a predecessor to the Genovese family.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Fanaro — was a member of the Morello family

descriptions: Lomonte gang murdered Giuseppe Fanaro, a member of the Morello family.
edges.evidence_quote: In November 1913, Fanaro was murdered by members of the Lomonte and Alfred Mineo 's gangs.

descriptions: The Morello family fought the Camorra in the Mafia-Camorra War.
edges.evidence_quote: This conflict was between the Sicilian Morello-Terranova family and Brooklyn Camorra gangs led by Pellegrino Morano .

descriptions: Morello family defeated the Camorra in the Mafia–Camorra War.
edges.evidence_quote: The Morellos were based in Manhattan 's Italian Harlem and eventually gained dominance in the Italian underworld by defeating the rival Neapolitan Camorra of Brooklyn .

descriptions: D'Aquila crime family is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brooklyn Camorra , D'Aquila crime family , Schiro crime family

descriptions: Morello family was the predecessor of the Genovese crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: They were the predecessors of what eventually became known as the Genovese crime family .

descriptions: Schiro crime family is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brooklyn Camorra , D'Aquila crime family , Schiro crime family

descriptions: The Navy Street gang was in conflict with the Morello family.
edges.evidence_quote: Both gangs initially worked together against the Morello family from Italian Harlem for control of the lucrative New York rackets

descriptions: Navy Street gang shot and killed Eugene Ubriaco and Nicholas Morello of the Morello family.
edges.evidence_quote: On September 7, 1916, Ubriaco along with Nicholas Morello meet with the Navy Street gang in Brooklyn and they both were shot to death on Johnson Street in Brooklyn.

descriptions: The White Hand Gang formed to keep Italian rivals like the Morello crime family at bay.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1900s, with Italian criminal organizations such as the Morello crime family encroaching on the waterfront, various Irish gangs united to form the White Hand Gang.

HooNaRa.description: Far-right hooligan group based around German football club Chemnitzer FC, founded in the early 1990s by Thomas Haller. Engaged in organized fights with other hooligan firms. Officially dissolved in 2007 but continues as a loose network of 20-30 members.

descriptions: HooNaRa was founded by the same person who ran CFC Security, indicating a close association.
edges.evidence_quote: HooNaRa was founded in the early 1990s by Thomas Haller, who also ran the security service CFC Security.

descriptions: Mezzatesta and Scalise were opposing sides in the Faida del Reventino.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida del Reventino , tra le cosche Mezzatesta e Scalise.

descriptions: Morabito maintains strong ties with Versace.
edges.evidence_quote: The Morabitos also maintain strong ties with the Maisano, Pansera, Versace, Zappia, Mollica, Criaco, and Scriva 'ndrine.

descriptions: Morabito has ties with Versace.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma possono contare su legami con i Maisano, Pansera, Versace, Zappia, Mollica, Criaco e Scriva.

descriptions: Longo and Versace merged through marriage, with Versace taking over leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: Violetta Longo, figlia di Luigi, sposò Antonio Versace, che prese il posto del suocero

descriptions: Versace Longo fought a war with Giovinazzo over drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: si scontrarono con i Giovinazzo (di Taurianova), in una guerra per il controllo del traffico di droga, tra il 1988 e il 1990

descriptions: GAS Gang had affiliations with Organised Crime.
edges.evidence_quote: GAS had affiliations with some local gangs such as ... Organised Crime (OC)

Boodle Gang.description: American street gang active in New York City during the mid-to-late 19th century. Known as 'butcher cart thieves' who hijacked food provision wagons in the 1850s. Later expanded to robbing messengers and couriers in the financial district. The gang declined in the 1890s due to gang wars and was defunct by the turn of the century.

descriptions: The Boodle Gang and Hudson Dusters were rivals, as listed in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Potashes , Hudson Dusters

descriptions: Hudson Dusters displaced Boodle Gang from dominance in Lower West Side Manhattan.
edges.evidence_quote: They and the much older Boodle Gang dominated Lower West Side Manhattan until the end of the 1890s when they were displaced by the then emerging Hudson Dusters

descriptions: The Boodle Gang and Potashes were rivals, as listed in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Potashes , Hudson Dusters

descriptions: Hudson Dusters and Gopher Gang fought against Boodle Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: the two gangs later became allies during the gang wars against Gay Nineties gangs, the Potashes and Boodle Gangs

descriptions: Infobox lists Boodle Gang as a rival of Hudson Dusters.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Boodle Gang

descriptions: Potashes and Boodle Gang jointly dominated Lower West Side Manhattan.
edges.evidence_quote: They and the much older Boodle Gang dominated Lower West Side Manhattan until the end of the 1890s

descriptions: The Laudani clan supported the Catania faction of Cursoti in the 1991 faida.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1991 scoppiò una violenta faida, che vide contrapposti da un lato i Cursoti catanesi, guidati da Giuseppe Garozzo e da Santo Mazzei e appoggiati dal clan Laudani (e quindi dai Santapaola , Ferrera, Ercolano e dai Malpassoti ), e dall’altro i milanesi, facenti capo a Jimmy Miano e supportati dal clan Cappello

descriptions: Laudani were initially allied with Pillera, later became enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: quest'ultimi prima legati al clan Pillera e successivamente nel 1986 divennero nemici.

descriptions: The Savasta group sought alliance with the Laudani clan.
edges.evidence_quote: il gruppo della Savasta guidato da Antonio Puglisi cerco alleanze con il clan Laudani detti "mussi di ficurinia"

descriptions: Clan Laudani has a rivalry with Cosa Nostra but also exerts influence over it in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: nella parte centrale ed orientale dell'isola prevale invece una struttura di tipo orizzontale, non più verticistica (« ad assetto variabile », l'ha definita un rapporto della DIA), sul modello della Stidda e dei clan Cappello e Laudani, che ormai, dopo decenni di rivalità, esercitano un'enorme influenza su Cosa nostra, specialmente nel campo del traffico di stupefacenti

descriptions: Street Soldiers is listed as an enemy of Wheels of Soul.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemies of the Wheels of Soul include the Outcast Motorcycle Club, Sin City Titans, Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club and the Street Soldiers.

descriptions: Wheels of Soul killed a member of Street Soldiers in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: Sometime during January 2011 in Chicago, a Wheels of Soul member shot a member of a rival gang, the Street Soldiers, killing them.

descriptions: Somali Outlaws are in conflict with Madhiban With Attitude.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws' main rivals are Hot Boyz, Madhiban With Attitude, and 1627 Boys
